check_interval_sec.description: Time interval, in seconds, between consecutive health checks; must be between 1 and 300 seconds.

description.description: Provides a description for the health check, used for identifying the resource in Google Cloud. Maximum length is 63 characters.

grpc_health_check.description: Configuration for a gRPC health check, including parameters like service name and port, used for monitoring the health of backend services.

healthy_threshold.description: Number of consecutive successful health check responses required before marking the instance as healthy.

http2_health_check.description: Defines the configuration for an HTTP/2 health check, including request path, port specification, and response timeout settings.
http2_health_check.type: list(object({host: optional(string),port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request_path: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

http_health_check.description: Defines the configuration for an HTTP health check, including parameters such as request path, port, and response timeout, to monitor the health of backend services.
http_health_check.type: list(object({host: optional(string),port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request_path: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

https_health_check.description: Configuration for an HTTPS health check, including criteria for determining the health status of a resource.
https_health_check.type: list(object({host: optional(string),port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request_path: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

log_config.description: Specifies whether logging is enabled for the health check, including configuration settings.

name.description: Specifies the name of the health check resource, which must be unique within the project and comply with Google Cloud's naming conventions.

source_regions.description: Defines the regions to which the health check request should be sent; must match regions where the backend service is deployed.

ssl_health_check.description: Defines the configuration for SSL health checks, including settings like port, request, and response expectations for validating the health of backend services.
ssl_health_check.type: list(object({port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

tcp_health_check.description: Defines the configuration for TCP health checks, specifying how the health check monitors the availability and responsiveness of a target service using TCP.
tcp_health_check.type: list(object({port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

timeout_sec.description: Duration in seconds to wait for a response before marking the health check as failed. Must be between 1 and 300 seconds.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout duration for health check requests, specifying how long to wait for a response before marking the check as failed.

unhealthy_threshold.description: Number of consecutive health check failures required to consider an instance unhealthy. Must be a positive integer.
